properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Can you feel it now? That strange call to Eden A deep somewhere is calling me to, a view from the other side. My amnesia is leaving me as I hear your word. I understand who I am and, a certain sound I heard from heaven say! "Come up hither", "come up higher" to things that are to be.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I have recognize your voice and I've gladly made my choice To walk in this narrow way in His broody footprints. I am preparing every day for my mansion over there His pyramid is pushing up from the inside.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I heard your voice, I answered "here I am". I separated from the thing I used to do Now I'm living in an atmosphere of heavenly The joys bell ring now I can sing that I have been redeemed by you blood you have met me. You have saved me. Now I have been set free.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: His transforming power's changing me from mortal to immortality my Angel beholds my father's face; My theophany
